title: The Central Reserve Police Force Act, 1949
full_text: The Central Reserve Police Force Act, 1949 केन्‍द्रीय रिजर्व पुलिस बल अधिनियम,1949 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 194966 Act Number: 66 Enactment Date: 1949-12-28 Act Year: 1949 Short Title: The Central Reserve Police Force Act, 1949 Hindi Title: केन्‍द्रीय रिजर्व पुलिस बल अधिनियम,1949 Long Title: An Act to provide for the constitution and regulation of an armed Central Reserve Police Force.
